content: Self-Refine’s iterative unsupervised refinement framework can be anchored to multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement loop that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and static self-reflection methods. This hybrid approach leverages the lack of need for external training data in Self-Refine, while solving the common flaw of one-dimensional self-feedback that often overlooks blind spots.
